title: Automatic Tools Swapping
description: Tools Swap will automatically change tools before they break, replacing them with the same type until you run out of tools in your inventory.
body:
Tools Swap keeps your workflow smooth by automatically replacing your tools before they break.
You can even set the durability threshold, so it swaps tools exactly when you want incase the server lags or something goes wrong.

It seamlessly switches to the next identical tool in your hotbar, letting you focus on your tasks without interruptions or worrying about your tools getting destroyed.
U can even decide if it uses the tools in your inventory too with a click in the settings.

**# Warning this is still getting tested and will be updated more later**
